companyStandards.label: Our Promise
companyStandards.subtitle: Every stay meets our high standards — so you can simply arrive and enjoy.

wifi.title: High-Speed Wi-Fi
wifi.description: Fast, reliable connection — ideal for streaming, video calls, and staying connected.

checkin.title: Self Check-In at Any Hour
checkin.description: A unique code for your stay — flexible arrival, no waiting.

accessible.title: Accessible Entrance
accessible.description: Dresden: street-level directly from the road. Berlin: just two small steps.

design.title: Lovingly Designed Apartments
design.description: Cozy is in our DNA — beautiful, functional and unforgettable.

bedding.title: Bed Linen & Towels
bedding.description: Bed linen, towels, bath towels and kitchen towels included.

cleaning.title: Deep Cleaning — Every Time
cleaning.description: Impeccable cleanliness for every stay. Our reviews speak for themselves.

businessTravel.label: For Business Travelers
businessTravel.subtitle: Designed for professionals on the move. Invoice on company name, work-grade infrastructure, and flexible check-in — everything you need for a productive stay in Berlin or Dresden.

invoice.title: Invoice & VAT Receipt
invoice.description: Book for your company. We issue invoices with full VAT breakdown — compatible with German Reisekostenabrechnung requirements.

wifi.title: Work-Grade Wi-Fi
wifi.description: 300 Mbps fiber in every apartment. Tested for full-day video conferencing, VPN access, and multiple simultaneous devices.

workspace.title: Dedicated Workspace
workspace.description: Every apartment has a proper desk and ergonomic setup. Work productively without sacrificing your living space.

teams.title: Team & Group Stays
teams.description: Our Berlin Ku'damm apartment sleeps up to 6 — ideal for project teams, off-sites, and relocation stays. Three times the space of a hotel room at a comparable price.

businessTravel.ctaNote: Response within 1 hour · Direct billing available
